<html lang="es">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Zanahoria</title>

<style>
body{
    margin:0;
    background:white;
}

img{
    width:100%;
    display:block;
}
</style>

</head>
<body>

<img src="zanahoria.png" alt="Infografía de la zanahoria">

</body>
</html>
